creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Sun Apr 20 06:34:11 2014
New Revision: 351611
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351611
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351611/

Log:
  sysutils/ldap-account-manager: update to 4.5
  
  This release allows to set fields on tab Personal to read-only. NIS mail aliases
  can managed on user tab and there is a new option if referrals should be followed.
  The Pro version supports Oracle databases and organizational roles. The self
  service now includes a language selection and password reset supports alternate
  email addresses.
  
  PR:		187709
  Submitted by:	"Vasiliy P. Melnik" <basil@vpm.net.ua> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	Sun Apr 20 01:35:39 2014	(r351610)
+++ head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	Sun Apr 20 06:34:11 2014	(r351611)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ldap-account-manager
-PORTVERSION=	4.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	4.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${SHORTNAME}/LAM/${PORTVERSION}

==============================================================================

@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (ldap-account-manager-4.5.tar.bz2) = 7652475905fdfb27b40feaa6c0dc39dc78caa6465e1654539799f5c40ae8f714
+SIZE (ldap-account-manager-4.5.tar.bz2) = 11729338
